title: This 260-Million-Year-Old Reptile Fossil Is Reshaping the Story of Turtle Evolution
description: Learn how a 260-million-year-old Permian reptile, once thought to explain turtle evolution, turned out to belong to a different lineage, reshaping the story of turtle origins in the Triassic Period.

title: 490-Million-Year-Old Arthropod Fossil Fills Puzzling Gap in Fossil Record - Sci.News
description: 490-Million-Year-Old Arthropod Fossil Fills Puzzling Gap in Fossil Record Sci.News Complex animals evolved up to 10 million years earlier than previously thought, fossil discovery shows Live Science These bizarre fossils represent some of the earliest moving, sexually reproducing life ever discovered Scientific American Forgotten fossil helps rewrite part of animal evolution EurekAlert! A 500-Million-Year-Old Fossil Adds a New Clue to a Missing Chapter of Animal Evolution Discover Magazine

title: 490-Million-Year-Old Arthropod Fossil Fills Puzzling Gap in Fossil Record
description: A new species of corcoraniid arthropod that lived during the Furongian epoch, between 497 and 487 million years ago, has been identified from an exceptionally preserved specimen found near Québec, Canada.

title: Rare Blue Moon hides the red light of an ancient star on May 31: Will you be able to see it?
description: Prepare for a spectacular sight, as the second full moon of May meets the red star Antares this weekend.
